introduction.p: Chad and Alex are co-owners of a pastry shop. Chad bakes pies and Alex bakes cakes. Chad is able to bake p pies each day he works and Alex is able to bake c cakes each day he works.
One month, Chad worked 16 days and Alex worked 19 days. That month they produced {16p+19c} baked goods in total.

statement.p: The next month, Chad worked 22 days and Alex worked 18 days. How many baked goods did they produce that month?
How many baked goods was that in total for those two months?
